task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: Let me first check your working directory for any existing files that might have relevant context (past agendas, Q2 notes, etc.) before putting together the agenda.

content.content: ERROR: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: ''

content.text: No existing files to reference, so I'll craft a well-structured, comprehensive 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda from scratch and save it now!

input.content:
================================================================
                  Q3 KICKOFF MEETING AGENDA
================================================================
Duration:  90 Minutes
Format:    [In-Person / Virtual]
Date/Time: [Date & Time TBD]
Location:  [Room / Video Link TBD]
Facilitator: [Name TBD]
Note-Taker:  [Name TBD]

----------------------------------------------------------------
MEETING OBJECTIVES
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Reflect on Q2 results and carry forward key learnings
  • Align on Q3 priorities, goals, and success metrics
  • Clarify roles, ownership, and cross-functional dependencies
  • Surface risks early and agree on mitigation approaches
  • Leave energized and clear on what we're building toward

----------------------------------------------------------------
AGENDA
----------------------------------------------------------------

[0:00 – 0:05]  1. WELCOME & HOUSEKEEPING                (5 min)
               Facilitator
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Welcome attendees and set the tone
               • Quick ground rules (cameras on, parking lot,
                 how to ask questions)
               • Confirm note-taker and time-keeper

[0:05 – 0:20]  2. Q2 RETROSPECTIVE SNAPSHOT             (15 min)
               Team Lead / Department Heads
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Key wins and milestones achieved in Q2
               • Goals missed and root causes (brief, blame-free)
               • Top 3 learnings to carry into Q3
               • Recognition of standout contributions

[0:20 – 0:40]  3. Q3 GOALS & PRIORITIES                 (20 min)
               Leadership / Strategy Lead
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Company-level Q3 OKRs / strategic priorities
               • Team-level goals and how they ladder up
               • Definition of success — what does "winning
                 Q3" look like?
               • Metrics and KPIs we will track
               • Changes in direction or strategy vs. Q2

[0:40 – 0:55]  4. INITIATIVES & ROADMAP REVIEW           (15 min)
               Project / Product Owners
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Key initiatives, projects, and deliverables
                 planned for Q3
               • High-level timeline and major milestones
               • Dependencies across teams or functions
               • What is IN scope vs. explicitly OUT of scope

[0:55 – 1:10]  5. ROLES, OWNERSHIP & WAYS OF WORKING    (15 min)
               Team Lead / Operations
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Owners assigned to each major initiative
               • Any team changes: new members, role shifts,
                 re-orgs taking effect in Q3
               • Updated norms — cadences, standups, reporting,
                 communication channels
               • Tools, processes, or workflows changing in Q3

[1:10 – 1:20]  6. RISKS, BLOCKERS & OPEN QUESTIONS      (10 min)
               All
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Known risks or headwinds entering Q3
               • Resource or capacity concerns
               • Open questions that need resolution
                 (capture in parking lot for follow-up)
               • Who owns resolving each blocker and by when

[1:20 – 1:28]  7. Q&A & OPEN DISCUSSION                  (8 min)
               All
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Team questions, concerns, or ideas not yet
                 covered
               • Ensure everyone has clarity and a voice

[1:28 – 1:30]  8. WRAP-UP & NEXT STEPS                   (2 min)
               Facilitator
               -----------------------------------------------
               • Recap of key decisions made today
               • Action items, owners, and due dates confirmed
               • When meeting notes will be shared
               • Reminder of first key milestone / check-in

----------------------------------------------------------------
ACTION ITEM TRACKER (to be completed during meeting)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  #  | Action Item              | Owner       | Due Date
  ---|--------------------------|-------------|------------
  1  |                          |             |
  2  |                          |             |
  3  |                          |             |
  4  |                          |             |
  5  |                          |             |

----------------------------------------------------------------
PARKING LOT (items to follow up on after the meeting)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  •
  •
  •

----------------------------------------------------------------
NOTES
----------------------------------------------------------------
  (To be filled in during / after the meeting)




================================================================
            Let's make Q3 our best quarter yet! 🚀
================================================================

content.text:
The agenda has been saved as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**! Here's a summary of how the 90 minutes are structured:

| # | Section | Time | Duration |
|---|---------|------|----------|
| 1 | Welcome & Housekeeping | 0:00 | 5 min |
| 2 | Q2 Retrospective Snapshot | 0:05 | 15 min |
| 3 | Q3 Goals & Priorities | 0:20 | 20 min |
| 4 | Initiatives & Roadmap Review | 0:40 | 15 min |
| 5 | Roles, Ownership & Ways of Working | 0:55 | 15 min |
| 6 | Risks, Blockers & Open Questions | 1:10 | 10 min |
| 7 | Q&A & Open Discussion | 1:20 | 8 min |
| 8 | Wrap-Up & Next Steps | 1:28 | 2 min |

**A few things to customize before sharing:**
- 📅 **Fill in the date/time, location, and video link**
- 👤 **Assign a facilitator and note-taker**
- 🎯 **Plug in your actual Q3 OKRs/KPIs** in section 3
- 📋 **Add specific initiative names** to section 4
- 👥 **Note any team changes** relevant to section 5

Would you like me to send this out to the team, create a calendar event for the meeting, or make any adjustments to the agenda?
